title: Add advertisement placements and visitor-based earning features

requirements.text: Create a reusable AdBanner component at frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx that renders a styled advertisement placeholder banner. The component should accept props for size ('leaderboard' 728x90, 'rectangle' 300x250, 'banner' 468x60), a label ('Advertisement'), and an optional ad slot ID or image URL. Style it with a light warm-toned background (amber/cream tones from the existing palette), a subtle border, and centered 'Advertisement' label text. Include a note in the component that ad network script tags (e.g. Google AdSense) can be injected here once an account is approved.

quotes: do changes my site as a ads and site vistor based earning site

acceptanceCriteria: AdBanner component renders without errors in three sizes: leaderboard, rectangle, and banner
Each variant displays the correct dimensions and an 'Advertisement' label
Styling is consistent with the existing warm terracotta/amber color palette
Component accepts an optional ad slot ID prop for future ad network integration

requirements.text: Place AdBanner components in high-visibility positions on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx): (1) a leaderboard banner (728x90) below the search/filter controls and above the hostel grid on desktop, collapsing to a rectangle (300x250) on mobile; (2) a rectangle banner (300x250) at the bottom of the hostel grid, after every 6 hostel cards (inline between cards in the grid). Ensure ad placements do not disrupt the hostel listing layout and are clearly labelled 'Advertisement'.

quotes: do changes my site as a ads and site vistor based earning site

acceptanceCriteria: A leaderboard/rectangle AdBanner appears below the filter controls and above the hostel grid on the Home page
A rectangle AdBanner appears after every 6 hostel cards in the grid
Ad placements are visible on both desktop and mobile
The hostel card grid layout is not broken by ad insertions

requirements.text: Place an AdBanner rectangle (300x250) on the HostelDetail page (frontend/src/pages/HostelDetail.tsx) in the sidebar area on desktop (beside the room sharing/pricing section) and below the contact section on mobile. The ad should be clearly labelled 'Advertisement' and styled consistently with the page.

quotes: do changes my site as a ads and site vistor based earning site

acceptanceCriteria: An AdBanner rectangle appears on the HostelDetail page beside the pricing section on desktop
On mobile the ad appears below the contact section
Ad is labelled 'Advertisement' and does not overlap hostel content

requirements.text: Add a 'Sponsored' badge and priority placement feature to hostel listings. In the backend (backend/main.mo), add an optional boolean field `isSponsored` to the Hostel type (defaulting to false). Update the addHostel and updateHostel functions to accept and store this field. In the frontend HostelCard component (frontend/src/components/HostelCard.tsx), display a 'Sponsored' badge (amber/gold colored pill label) in the top-left corner of the card image when `isSponsored` is true. In the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx), sort sponsored hostels to appear before non-sponsored hostels in the listing, regardless of other sort order.

quotes: do changes my site as a ads and site vistor based earning site

acceptanceCriteria: The Hostel type in backend/main.mo has an optional `isSponsored` field
addHostel and updateHostel functions accept the `isSponsored` field
HostelCard displays a gold/amber 'Sponsored' badge when isSponsored is true
Sponsored hostels appear at the top of the listing on the Home page above non-sponsored hostels

requirements.text: Create an 'Advertise With Us' page at frontend/src/pages/Advertise.tsx that explains the monetization and advertising opportunities available on Hostel Addas. The page should include: (1) a hero section with headline 'Grow Your Business with Hostel Addas'; (2) a 'Sponsored Listing' section explaining that hostel owners can pay to have their listing shown at the top with a Sponsored badge; (3) an 'Ad Placements' section explaining banner ad slots available on the home and detail pages with approximate visitor reach; (4) a 'Visitor Stats' section with a placeholder showing site traffic metrics (e.g. 'Growing audience of students and working professionals in Hyderabad'); (5) a contact/inquiry section with a WhatsApp or email call-to-action (use a placeholder number/email with instruction to update). Style consistently with the warm terracotta/sage/amber palette.

quotes: do changes my site as a ads and site vistor based earning site

acceptanceCriteria: Advertise page renders at /advertise route
Page includes sponsored listing, ad placement, visitor stats, and contact sections
Page is styled consistently with the existing warm color palette
Contact CTA is visible with a placeholder WhatsApp/email link

requirements.text: Register the '/advertise' route in frontend/src/App.tsx that renders the Advertise page component, nested under the existing Layout root route alongside other page routes.

quotes: do changes my site as a ads and site vistor based earning site

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /advertise renders the Advertise page
The page is wrapped in the Layout component with header and footer

requirements.text: Add an 'Advertise' link to the footer section of the Layout component (frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx) linking to the '/advertise' page. Also add a small 'Advertise' text link in the sticky header navigation (beside the existing nav links) so site visitors and hostel owners can easily discover the monetization page.

quotes: do changes my site as a ads and site vistor based earning site

acceptanceCriteria: 'Advertise' link appears in the footer and navigates to /advertise
'Advertise' link appears in the header navigation
Both links use the existing navigation styling

requirements.text: Add a simple visitor counter feature to the backend (backend/main.mo): add a stable `var visitorCount : Nat = 0` variable and a public function `recordVisit() : async Nat` that increments the counter and returns the new total, plus a query function `getVisitorCount() : async Nat` that returns the current count. On the frontend, call `recordVisit()` once per session (guard with sessionStorage to avoid double-counting on re-renders) in the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) when the page mounts. Display the total visitor count in the footer of the Layout component (frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx) as a small stat: 'Visitors: X' styled subtly in the footer text.

quotes: do changes my site as a ads and site vistor based earning site

acceptanceCriteria: backend/main.mo exposes recordVisit() and getVisitorCount() functions
Home page calls recordVisit() once per browser session using sessionStorage guard
Footer displays the live visitor count fetched from getVisitorCount()
Visitor count increments correctly on each new session visit

constraints: Do not integrate any real third-party ad network SDK (e.g. Google AdSense script tags) — all ad slots must be placeholders ready for future integration
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All backend changes must remain within the single-actor architecture in backend/main.mo
nonGoals: Real-time ad bidding or programmatic advertising integration
Payment processing for sponsored listings (manual offline arrangement only)
User authentication or login wall for ad management
Analytics dashboard beyond the simple visitor counter

required: Rectangular advertisement placeholder banner graphic with a soft amber/cream gradient background and centered 'Advertisement' text in muted gray, horizontal layout (ad-placeholder-leaderboard.dim_728x90.png)
Square advertisement placeholder graphic with a soft amber/cream gradient background and centered 'Advertisement' text in muted gray (ad-placeholder-rectangle.dim_300x250.png)
